1752460.name: OMSI 2 Add-On Coachbus 250Next
1752460.description:
Discover the next OMSI 2 add-on in the Coachbus 250 series: Coachbus 250Next!

The Coachbus 250Next is a large class bus designed to transport people over long distances. The bus’s modularity allows it to operate as a tourist bus as well as for long-distance transport between cities and as a suburban bus. It is equipped with a six-cylinder diesel engine D2356H M6U with manual transmission S6-90U or diesel engine Y-238 with manual transmission S6-90U.

The add-on offers a wide variety of modifications, both exclusive and rare, of the Coachbus 250Next. Accurate geometry, high-quality sounds, realistic physics and high-quality textures guarantee a gaming experience that is close to reality.


  • Several modifications through the different years of production:
    - Coachbus 250.67
    - Coachbus 250.67_2x
    - Coachbus 250.93 Engine 2356
    - Coachbus 250.93 Engine 238
    - Coachbus 250.95 Engine 2356
    - Coachbus 250.95 Engine 238
    - Coachbus 250.98
    - Coachbus 250.98_2x
    - Coachbus 250_SL
    - Coachbus 250_SL_2x

  • Accurate geometry
  • High-quality sounds
  • Realistic physics
  • High-quality textures
1752460.supported_languages:
英语, 德语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
